Why Join The Beta

Early users help turn a strong concept into a better real-world product.

1

Get In Early

Join before public launch and use the platform while the product is still taking shape.

2

Influence The Product

Your feedback helps shape features, score logic, workflows, and priorities.

3

Founding User Advantages

Early members may receive better access, future pricing advantages, and priority updates.

What Founding Members Get

Beta is not just a waitlist. It is early participation in the product.

Founding beta includes
  • Early access before wider launch
  • Lower founding pricing consideration
  • Direct feature feedback input
  • Priority invites and product updates
  • Founding member status

Who This Beta Is For

CCC is built for people who want better days, not more noise.

Busy Adults

People balancing work, family, stress, and health goals without extra time.

Professionals

Sharper mornings, better energy, and clearer decision-making.

Men 40+

Recovery, hormones, strength, momentum, and consistency matter more now.

Carnivore / Keto

People who want better feedback from how food, sleep, and recovery interact.

What We Need From Beta Users

  • Use CCC consistently for a few weeks
  • Share what feels confusing or weak
  • Tell us which signals matter most
  • Help validate the score and mode system
  • Give direct product feedback

What You Get Back

  • Early access to the system
  • Better understanding of your own patterns
  • Clearer daily decisions
  • A voice in shaping what gets built
  • Founding-user access before public launch

What Early Users Say

Early traction starts with simple wins.

“CCC helped me connect bad sleep with low-focus days.”

“The modes made it easier to know whether to push, recover, or reset.”

“I liked having a simple daily score instead of guessing.”

Claim Your Founding Spot

Join the list for invites, updates, and first access to CCC.

23 of 100 founding users joined the beta

Free during beta. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime. If you do not see confirmation, check Promotions/Junk.
